src/tzutrader/declarative/schema

        $
      • `$`(loc: SourceLocation): string
      • `$`(op: ComparisonOp): string
      • `$`(p: ParamValue): string
        formatError
      • formatError(msg: string; loc: Option[SourceLocation] = none(SourceLocation)): string
        newAndCondition
      • newAndCondition(conditions: seq[ConditionYAML]): ConditionYAML
        newBatchOutput
      • newBatchOutput(formats: seq[string] = @["csv"]; comparisonReport: Option[string] = none(string); individualResults: Option[string] = none(string)): BatchOutputYAML
        newDataConfigCsv
      • newDataConfigCsv(csvFile: string): DataConfigYAML
        newDataConfigYahoo
      • newDataConfigYahoo(symbols: seq[string]; startDate: string; endDate: string): DataConfigYAML
        newNotCondition

        newOrCondition
      • newOrCondition(conditions: seq[ConditionYAML]): ConditionYAML
        newParamBool
      • newParamBool(val: bool): ParamValue
        newParamFloat
      • newParamFloat(val: float): ParamValue
        newParamInt
      • newParamInt(val: int): ParamValue
        newParamString
      • newParamString(val: string): ParamValue
        newPortfolioConfig
      • newPortfolioConfig(initialCash: float = 100000.0; commission: float = 0.001; minCommission: Option[float] = none(float); riskFreeRate: Option[float] = none(float)): PortfolioConfigYAML
        newSimpleCondition
      • newSimpleCondition(left: string; op: ComparisonOp; right: string): ConditionYAML
        newStrategyVariant
      • newStrategyVariant(file: string; name: string; overrides: Option[ StrategyOverrides] = none(StrategyOverrides)): StrategyVariantYAML
        newSweepParameter
      • newSweepParameter(path: string; range: SweepRange): SweepParameter
        newSweepRangeLinear
      • newSweepRangeLinear(min: float; max: float; step: float): SweepRange
        newSweepRangeList
      • newSweepRangeList(values: seq[float]): SweepRange

Types

BatchOutputYAML = object
  comparisonReport*: Option[string]
  individualResults*: Option[string]
  formats*: seq[string]
Output configuration for batch tests 
BatchTestYAML = object
  version*: string
  metadata*: MetadataYAML
  data*: DataConfigYAML
  strategies*: seq[StrategyVariantYAML]
  portfolio*: PortfolioConfigYAML
  output*: BatchOutputYAML
Complete batch test configuration 
ComparisonOp = enum
  opLessThan = "<", opGreaterThan = ">", opLessEqual = "<=",
  opGreaterEqual = ">=", opEqual = "==", opNotEqual = "!=",
  opCrossesAbove = "crosses_above", opCrossesBelow = "crosses_below"
Comparison operators for conditions 
ConditionKind = enum
  ckSimple, ckAnd, ckOr, ckNot
Discriminator for condition types 
ConditionOverride = object
  entry*: Option[ConditionYAML]
  exit*: Option[ConditionYAML]
Override for entry/exit conditions 
ConditionYAML = object
  location*: Option[SourceLocation]
  case kind*: ConditionKind
  of ckSimple:
    left*: string
    operator*: ComparisonOp
    right*: string
  of ckAnd:
    andConditions*: seq[ConditionYAML]
  of ckOr:
    orConditions*: seq[ConditionYAML]
  of ckNot:
    notCondition*: ref ConditionYAML
A single condition in a rule Can be a simple comparison or a boolean combination 
DataConfigYAML = object
  case source*: DataSourceKind
  of dsYahoo:
    symbols*: seq[string]
    startDate*: string
    endDate*: string
  of dsCsv:
    csvFile*: string
  of dsCoinbase:
    coinbaseSymbols*: seq[string]
    coinbaseStart*: string
    coinbaseEnd*: string
Data source configuration for batch tests 
DataSourceKind = enum
  dsYahoo, dsCsv, dsCoinbase
Type of data source 
IndicatorOverride = object
  params*: Table[string, ParamValue]
Override for a single indicator parameter 
IndicatorYAML = object
  id*: string
  indicatorType*: string
  params*: Table[string, ParamValue]
  source*: Option[string]
  output*: Option[string]
  location*: Option[SourceLocation]
Indicator definition - type and parameters 
MetadataYAML = object
  name*: string
  description*: string
  author*: Option[string]
  created*: Option[string]
  tags*: seq[string]
Strategy metadata - who, what, when 
ParameterSweepYAML = object
  version*: string
  metadata*: MetadataYAML
  baseStrategy*: string
  data*: DataConfigYAML
  portfolio*: PortfolioConfigYAML
  parameters*: seq[SweepParameter]
  output*: SweepOutputYAML
Complete parameter sweep configuration 
ParamKind = enum
  pkInt, pkFloat, pkString, pkBool
Parameter value type discriminator 
ParamValue = object
  case kind*: ParamKind
  of pkInt:
    intVal*: int
  of pkFloat:
    floatVal*: float
  of pkString:
    strVal*: string
  of pkBool:
    boolVal*: bool
Parameter value - can be int, float, string, or bool 
PortfolioConfigYAML = object
  initialCash*: float
  commission*: float
  minCommission*: Option[float]
  riskFreeRate*: Option[float]
Portfolio configuration 
PositionSizingKind = enum
  psFixed, psPercent, psDynamic
Position sizing strategy type 
PositionSizingYAML = object
  case kind*: PositionSizingKind
  of psFixed:
    fixedSize*: float
  of psPercent:
    percentCapital*: float
  of psDynamic:
    dynamicExpr*: string
How much to trade (Phase 1: fixed size only) 
RuleYAML = object
  conditions*: ConditionYAML
Entry or exit rule - when to take action 
SourceLocation = object
  line*: int
  column*: int
Location in the YAML source file (for better error messages) 
StrategyOverrides = object
  indicators*: Option[Table[string, IndicatorOverride]]
  conditions*: Option[ConditionOverride]
  positionSizing*: Option[PositionSizingYAML]
Parameter overrides for a strategy variant 
StrategyVariantYAML = object
  file*: string
  name*: string
  overrides*: Option[StrategyOverrides]
A strategy with optional parameter overrides 
StrategyYAML = object
  metadata*: MetadataYAML
  indicators*: seq[IndicatorYAML]
  entryRule*: RuleYAML
  exitRule*: RuleYAML
  positionSizing*: PositionSizingYAML
Complete declarative strategy definition 
SweepOutputYAML = object
  heatmap*: Option[string]
  bestResults*: string
  fullResults*: string
Output configuration for parameter sweeps 
SweepParameter = object
  path*: string
  range*: SweepRange
Parameter to sweep 
SweepRange = object
  case kind*: SweepRangeKind
  of srkLinear:
    min*: float
    max*: float
    step*: float
  of srkList:
    values*: seq[float]
Range of values for parameter sweep 
SweepRangeKind = enum
  srkLinear, srkList
Type of parameter sweep range

Procs

proc `$`(loc: SourceLocation): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Convert source location to string (line:column format) 
proc `$`(op: ComparisonOp): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Convert operator to string 
proc `$`(p: ParamValue): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Convert parameter to string for debugging 
proc formatError(msg: string; loc: Option[SourceLocation] = none(SourceLocation)): string {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Format an error message with optional location information 
proc newAndCondition(conditions: seq[ConditionYAML]): ConditionYAML {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a boolean AND condition 
proc newBatchOutput(formats: seq[string] = @["csv"];
                    comparisonReport: Option[string] = none(string);
                    individualResults: Option[string] = none(string)): BatchOutputYAML {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create batch output configuration 
proc newDataConfigCsv(csvFile: string): DataConfigYAML {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create a CSV data configuration 
proc newDataConfigYahoo(symbols: seq[string]; startDate: string; endDate: string): DataConfigYAML {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a Yahoo Finance data configuration 
proc newNotCondition(condition: ConditionYAML): ConditionYAML {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a boolean NOT condition 
proc newOrCondition(conditions: seq[ConditionYAML]): ConditionYAML {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a boolean OR condition 
proc newParamBool(val: bool): ParamValue {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a boolean parameter 
proc newParamFloat(val: float): ParamValue {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a float parameter 
proc newParamInt(val: int): ParamValue {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create an integer parameter 
proc newParamString(val: string): ParamValue {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a string parameter 
proc newPortfolioConfig(initialCash: float = 100000.0;
                        commission: float = 0.001;
                        minCommission: Option[float] = none(float);
                        riskFreeRate: Option[float] = none(float)): PortfolioConfigYAML {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a portfolio configuration with sensible defaults 
proc newSimpleCondition(left: string; op: ComparisonOp; right: string): ConditionYAML {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a simple comparison condition 
proc newStrategyVariant(file: string; name: string; overrides: Option[
    StrategyOverrides] = none(StrategyOverrides)): StrategyVariantYAML {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a strategy variant 
proc newSweepParameter(path: string; range: SweepRange): SweepParameter {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a sweep parameter 
proc newSweepRangeLinear(min: float; max: float; step: float): SweepRange {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a linear parameter sweep range 
proc newSweepRangeList(values: seq[float]): SweepRange {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create a list-based parameter sweep range

Made with Nim. Generated: 2026-02-02 03:41:50 UTC
